CustomNPC+ Javadoc Reference
Back to Index
  • All Classes
 

All Classes

  • All Classes Interface Summary Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractNpcAPI
    This object stores functions available to all scripting handlers through the "API" keyword.
    IAbility
    Interface for NPC abilities.
    IAbilityAction
    Common API interface for all combat actions (abilities and chained abilities).
    IAbilityCharge
    API interface for Charge abilities.
    IAbilityCounter
    API interface for Counter abilities.
    IAbilityCutter
    API interface for Cutter abilities.
    IAbilityDash
    API interface for Dash abilities.
    IAbilityDefend
    API interface for defensive abilities (Guard, Counter, Dodge).
    IAbilityDisc
    API interface for Disc abilities.
    IAbilityDodge
    API interface for Dodge abilities.
    IAbilityEffect
    API interface for Effect abilities.
    IAbilityEnergyBeam
    API interface for Energy Beam abilities.
    IAbilityEnergyProjectile
    Shared API interface for energy projectile abilities (Orb, Disc, Beam, LaserShot).
    IAbilityEvent
    Events related to NPC ability execution.
    IAbilityEvent.CompleteEvent
    Fired when an ability completes its full execution cycle.
    IAbilityEvent.ExecuteEvent
    Fired when an ability enters the ACTIVE phase and performs its effect.
    IAbilityEvent.HitEvent
    Fired when an ability hits an entity with damage.
    IAbilityEvent.InterruptEvent
    Fired when an ability is interrupted by damage.
    IAbilityEvent.StartEvent
    Fired when an ability starts executing (enters WINDUP phase).
    IAbilityEvent.TickEvent
    Fired every tick while an ability is executing.
    IAbilityEvent.ToggleEvent
    Fired when a toggle ability is switched ON or OFF.
    IAbilityEvent.ToggleUpdateEvent
    Fired every 10 ticks for each active toggle ability.
    IAbilityGuard
    API interface for Guard abilities.
    IAbilityHandler
    Handler for ability registration and creation.
    IAbilityHandler
    Handler for ability management.
    IAbilityHazard
    API interface for Hazard abilities.
    IAbilityHeavyHit
    API interface for Heavy Hit abilities.
    IAbilityLaser
    API interface for Laser abilities.
    IAbilityOrb
    API interface for Orb abilities.
    IAbilityProjectile
    API interface for Projectile abilities.
    IAbilityShockwave
    API interface for Shockwave abilities.
    IAbilitySlam
    API interface for Slam abilities.
    IAbilitySweeper
    API interface for Sweeper abilities.
    IAbilityTeleport
    API interface for Teleport abilities.
    IAbilityTrap
    API interface for Trap abilities.
    IAbilityVortex
    API interface for Vortex abilities.
    IAbilityZone
    API interface for zone-based abilities (Trap, Hazard).
    IAction
    Represents a single "task" that can be executed over multiple ticks, supports delayed start, limited duration, repeating intervals, data storage, and chaining to neighboring tasks.
    IActionChain  
    IActionListener
    Listener interface for action hooks.
    IActionManager
    Manages a queue of IAction instances, allowing scheduling of delayed, repeating, or conditional "tasks" for NPC scripting.
    IActionQueue  
    IAnimal<T extends net.minecraft.entity.passive.EntityAnimal>
    Represents an animal entity with additional behavior such as breeding, following, and mating.
    IAnimatable
    Represents an entity capable of playing animations.
    IAnimation  
    IAnimationData
    Holds and manages animation data for an animatable entity.
    IAnimationEvent
    Events fired during entity animation playback.
    IAnimationEvent.Ended
    Fired when an animation finishes playing.
    IAnimationEvent.IFrameEvent
    Events fired when animation frames are entered or exited.
    IAnimationEvent.IFrameEvent.Entered  
    IAnimationEvent.IFrameEvent.Exited  
    IAnimationEvent.Started
    Fired when an animation starts playing.
    IAnimationHandler  
    IAnvilRecipe  
    IArrow<T extends net.minecraft.entity.projectile.EntityArrow>
    Represents a arrow entity with additional methods.
    IAttributeDefinition
    Defines the blueprint for an attribute.
    IAttributeHandler
    Handles registration and lookup of attribute definitions as well as retrieval of player attributes.
    IAuctionClaim
    Represents an auction claim (item or currency to be collected).
    IAuctionEvent
    Events related to auction actions.
    IAuctionEvent.BidEvent
    Fired before a player places a bid on an auction.
    IAuctionEvent.BuyoutEvent
    Fired before a player buys out an auction.
    IAuctionEvent.CancelEvent
    Fired before a player cancels an auction listing.
    IAuctionEvent.ClaimEvent
    Fired before a player claims an item or currency from an auction.
    IAuctionEvent.CreateEvent
    Fired before a player creates a new auction listing.
    IAuctionHandler
    Handler for the Auction system.
    IAuctionListing
    Represents an auction listing.
    IAvailability
    Defines the conditions that determine if certain NPC interactions (dialogs, quests, and faction requirements) are available to a player.
    IBlock  
    IBlockEvent
    Events fired for scripted blocks, including interactions, redstone, and entity collisions.
    IBlockEvent.BreakEvent  
    IBlockEvent.ClickedEvent  
    IBlockEvent.CollidedEvent  
    IBlockEvent.EntityFallenUponEvent  
    IBlockEvent.ExplodedEvent  
    IBlockEvent.HarvestedEvent  
    IBlockEvent.InitEvent  
    IBlockEvent.InteractEvent  
    IBlockEvent.NeighborChangedEvent  
    IBlockEvent.RainFillEvent  
    IBlockEvent.RedstoneEvent  
    IBlockEvent.TimerEvent  
    IBlockEvent.UpdateEvent  
    IBlockScripted  
    IButton
    Represents a clickable button component in a custom GUI.
    IChainedAbility
    API interface for chained abilities - ordered sequences of ability references that execute one after another with configurable delays.
    IChainEvent
    Events related to chained ability execution lifecycle.
    IChainEvent.CompleteEvent
    Fired when a chained ability sequence completes all entries.
    IChainEvent.InterruptEvent
    Fired when a chained ability is interrupted by damage.
    IChainEvent.NextEvent
    Fired when the chain advances to the next entry in the sequence.
    IChainEvent.StartEvent
    Fired when a chained ability sequence starts executing.
    ICloneHandler
    Handles storing and spawning cloned entities.
    ICommand
    Represents a custom command that can be registered and executed.
    IConditionalAction  
    IContainer  
    ICustomAbility
    A custom (script-driven) ability whose behavior is entirely defined by script event hooks.
    ICustomAttribute
    Represents an instance of a custom attribute.
    ICustomEffect  
    ICustomEffectHandler
    Handler interface for managing custom effects.
    ICustomGui
    Represents a custom graphical user interface (GUI) that can contain various components such as buttons, labels, text fields, item slots, etc.
    ICustomGuiComponent
    Base interface for all custom GUI components.
    ICustomGuiEvent
    Events fired when a player interacts with a custom GUI.
    ICustomGuiEvent.ButtonEvent  
    ICustomGuiEvent.CloseEvent  
    ICustomGuiEvent.ScrollEvent  
    ICustomGuiEvent.SlotClickEvent  
    ICustomGuiEvent.SlotEvent  
    ICustomGuiEvent.UnfocusedEvent  
    ICustomNpc<T extends net.minecraft.entity.EntityCreature>
    Represents a customizable NPC with a wide variety of properties such as appearance, behavior, combat, loot, and more.
    ICustomNPCsEvent
    Base interface for all CustomNPC+ script events.
    ICustomNPCsEvent.CNPCNaturalSpawnEvent  
    ICustomNPCsEvent.ScriptedCommandEvent  
    ICustomOverlay  
    ICustomOverlayComponent  
    IDamageSource  
    IDataAbilities
    Interface for an NPC's ability data manager.
    IDBCPlayer
    Extends IPlayer with additional methods specific to DBC (Dragon Ball C) players.
    IDialog  
    IDialogCategory  
    IDialogEvent
    Events fired during dialog interactions between a player and an NPC.
    IDialogEvent.DialogClosed
    Fired when a dialog is closed.
    IDialogEvent.DialogOpen
    Fired when a dialog is opened.
    IDialogEvent.DialogOption
    Fired when a dialog option is selected.
    IDialogHandler
    Handles retrieval of dialogs and dialog categories.
    IDialogImage  
    IDialogOption  
    IEnergyAbility<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Base interface for all energy ability entities (Projectiles, Barriers).
    IEnergyAnchorData
    Configuration for the anchor point of an energy ability projectile.
    IEnergyBarrier<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Base interface for energy barrier entities (Dome, Panel).
    IEnergyBarrierEvent
    Events fired during energy barrier lifecycle and interactions.
    IEnergyBarrierEvent.DestroyedEvent
    Fired when the barrier is destroyed.
    IEnergyBarrierEvent.HitEvent
    Fired when the barrier is hit by an energy projectile.
    IEnergyBarrierEvent.SpawnedEvent
    Fired when an energy barrier is spawned.
    IEnergyBarrierEvent.UpdateEvent
    Fired each tick while the barrier exists.
    IEnergyBeam<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    A directional beam projectile with a trailing path and optional head orb.
    IEnergyCombatData
    Combat properties for energy ability projectiles.
    IEnergyDisc<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    A flat spinning disc projectile with optional boomerang behavior.
    IEnergyDisplayData
    Visual display properties for energy ability projectiles.
    IEnergyDome<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Represents an energy dome barrier - a spherical shield centered on the caster.
    IEnergyExplosion<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Represents a standalone energy explosion entity.
    IEnergyHandler
    Central controller for creating energy entities and routing energy damage.
    IEnergyHomingData
    Homing and speed properties for energy ability projectiles.
    IEnergyLaser<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    A continuous laser beam that extends outward from its origin along a direction vector.
    IEnergyLifespanData
    Lifespan properties for energy ability projectiles.
    IEnergyLightningData
    Lightning visual effect properties for energy ability projectiles.
    IEnergyOrb<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    A spherical homing energy ball.
    IEnergyPanel<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Represents an energy panel barrier - a flat rectangular shield (Wall or Shield mode).
    IEnergyProjectile<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Base interface for all energy projectile entities (Orb, Beam, Disc, Laser, Slicer).
    IEnergyProjectileEvent
    Events fired during energy projectile lifecycle and impacts.
    IEnergyProjectileEvent.BlockImpactEvent
    Fired when the projectile hits a block.
    IEnergyProjectileEvent.EntityImpactEvent
    Fired when the projectile hits an entity.
    IEnergyProjectileEvent.ExpiredEvent
    Fired when the projectile expires without hitting anything.
    IEnergyProjectileEvent.FiredEvent
    Fired when an energy projectile is launched.
    IEnergyProjectileEvent.UpdateEvent
    Fired each tick while the projectile exists.
    IEnergySlicer<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    A thin, wide blade projectile that slices through targets.
    IEnergySweeper<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Entity-level interface for sweeper beam entities.
    IEnergyZone<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Entity-level interface for zone entities (Hazard and Trap).
    IEntity<T extends net.minecraft.entity.Entity>
    Represents a generic entity in the world.
    IEntityItem<T extends net.minecraft.entity.item.EntityItem>
    Represents an item entity in the world.
    IEntityLiving<T extends net.minecraft.entity.EntityLiving>
    Represents a living entity (mob, NPC, etc.) that extends the base living functionality.
    IEntityLivingBase<T extends net.minecraft.entity.EntityLivingBase>
    Represents a living entity (mob, NPC, etc.) with additional methods to manage health, damage, targeting, vision, potion effects, equipment, and various attributes.
    IFaction  
    IFactionEvent
    Events fired when a player's faction standing changes.
    IFactionEvent.FactionPoints
    Fired when a player's faction points change.
    IFactionHandler
    Handles creation, deletion, and retrieval of factions.
    IFishHook<T extends net.minecraft.entity.projectile.EntityFishHook>
    Represents a fish hook entity with additional methods.
    IForgeEvent
    Wrapper events for Forge events, allowing scripts to listen for native Forge events.
    IForgeEvent.EntityEvent
    Fired for Forge entity events.
    IForgeEvent.InitEvent
    Fired during Forge initialization.
    IForgeEvent.WorldEvent
    Fired for Forge world events.
    IFrame  
    IFramePart  
    IHitboxData
    Provides configuration data for an NPC's custom hitbox dimensions.
    IHookDefinition
    Defines metadata for a script hook, enabling rich hook registration with proper type information for stub generation, imports, and documentation.
    IItemArmor  
    IItemBlock  
    IItemBook  
    IItemCustom  
    IItemCustomizable  
    IItemEvent
    Events fired for scripted/customizable items during their lifecycle and interactions.
    IItemEvent.AttackEvent
    Fired when the item is used to attack an entity.
    IItemEvent.BreakItem
    Fired when the item breaks due to durability loss or consumption.
    IItemEvent.FinishUsingItem
    Fired when the player finishes using the item (full duration).
    IItemEvent.InitEvent
    Fired when the item is initialized.
    IItemEvent.InteractEvent
    Fired when the item is used to interact with an entity.
    IItemEvent.PickedUpEvent
    Fired when the item is picked up.
    IItemEvent.RepairItem
    Fired when the item is repaired on an anvil.
    IItemEvent.RightClickEvent
    Fired when the item is right-clicked.
    IItemEvent.SpawnEvent
    Fired when the item entity spawns in the world.
    IItemEvent.StartUsingItem
    Fired when the player starts using the item (e.g., drawing a bow).
    IItemEvent.StopUsingItem
    Fired when the player stops using the item before completion.
    IItemEvent.TossedEvent
    Fired when the item is tossed/dropped.
    IItemEvent.UpdateEvent
    Fired each tick while the item exists in an entity's inventory.
    IItemEvent.UsingItem
    Fired each tick while the player is using the item.
    IItemLinked  
    IItemSlot
    Represents an item slot component in a custom GUI.
    IItemStack
    Represents an item stack with extended functionality: enchantments, lore, and additional item data.
    IJob  
    IJobBard  
    IJobConversation  
    IJobFollower  
    IJobGuard  
    IJobHealer  
    IJobItemGiver  
    IJobSpawner  
    ILabel
    Represents a text label component in a custom GUI.
    ILine
    Represents a line component in a custom GUI.
    ILine
    Represents a single NPC dialog line with text, an optional sound, and target formatting.
    ILines
    A collection of dialog lines, supporting creation, indexed access, and random retrieval.
    ILinkedItem
    Represents a linked item definition.
    ILinkedItemEvent
    Events fired for linked items when their version changes or when they are being built.
    ILinkedItemEvent.BuildEvent
    Fired when the linked item is being built/constructed.
    ILinkedItemEvent.VersionChangeEvent
    Fired when the linked item's version changes.
    ILinkedItemHandler
    Handles registration and retrieval of linked items.
    IMagic
    Represents a magic element that can have interactions with other magics.
    IMagicCycle
    Represents a cycle (or category) grouping for magics.
    IMagicData  
    IMagicHandler
    Provides methods to access and modify magic and magic cycles.
    IMark
    Represents a mark that can be applied to an entity.
    IModelData
    Provides configuration data for a model including wearable settings, hidden parts, rotation, and scale.
    IModelRotate
    Represents the rotation configuration for a model.
    IModelRotatePart
    Represents the rotation settings for a specific part of a model.
    IModelScale
    Represents the scaling configuration for a model.
    IModelScalePart
    Represents the scale configuration for a specific part of a model.
    IMonster<T extends net.minecraft.entity.monster.EntityMob>
    Represents a monster entity.
    INaturalSpawn
    Configures a natural spawn entry for custom NPCs, including entity templates, biome restrictions, spawn conditions, and cooldowns.
    INaturalSpawnsHandler
    Handles natural spawn configurations for custom NPCs.
    INbt
    A scripted data representation of an MC NBTTagCompound object.
    INpcEvent
    Events fired for CustomNPC entities during their lifecycle and interactions.
    INpcEvent.CollideEvent
    Fired when an entity collides with the NPC.
    INpcEvent.DamagedEvent
    Fired when the NPC takes damage.
    INpcEvent.DialogClosedEvent
    Fired when a dialog with the NPC is closed.
    INpcEvent.DialogEvent
    Fired when a dialog opens with the NPC.
    INpcEvent.DiedEvent
    Fired when the NPC dies.
    INpcEvent.InitEvent
    Fired when the NPC is initialized.
    INpcEvent.InteractEvent
    Fired when a player interacts with the NPC.
    INpcEvent.KilledEntityEvent
    Fired when the NPC kills an entity.
    INpcEvent.MeleeAttackEvent
    Fired when the NPC performs a melee attack.
    INpcEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent
    Fired when the NPC launches a ranged attack.
    INpcEvent.SwingEvent
    Fired when the NPC swings its weapon.
    INpcEvent.TargetEvent
    Fired when the NPC acquires a new target.
    INpcEvent.TargetLostEvent
    Fired when the NPC loses its current target.
    INpcEvent.TimerEvent
    Fired when an NPC timer triggers.
    INpcEvent.UpdateEvent
    Fired each tick for the NPC.
    IOverlayHandler
    Manages skin overlays applied to an entity or player.
    IOverlayLabel  
    IOverlayLine  
    IOverlayTexturedRect  
    IParticle
    A particle that can be spawned in the world, complete with translation, scale, rotate, and color transformations.
    IParty  
    IPartyEvent
    Events fired during party operations such as quest progress, invitations, kicks, and disbanding.
    IPartyEvent.PartyDisbandEvent
    Fired when the party is disbanded.
    IPartyEvent.PartyInviteEvent
    Fired when a player is invited to the party.
    IPartyEvent.PartyKickEvent
    Fired when a player is kicked from the party.
    IPartyEvent.PartyLeaveEvent
    Fired when a player voluntarily leaves the party.
    IPartyEvent.PartyQuestCompletedEvent
    Fired when a party quest is completed.
    IPartyEvent.PartyQuestSetEvent
    Fired when a quest is assigned to the party.
    IPartyEvent.PartyQuestTurnedInEvent
    Fired when a party quest is turned in.
    IPartyHandler  
    IPartyOptions
    Configures party-related options for quests, controlling membership requirements, reward distribution, completion rules, and party size limits.
    IPixelmon<T extends net.minecraft.entity.passive.EntityTameable>
    Represents a Pixelmon (a tameable creature) with additional attributes such as shiny state, level, IV/EV values, nature, moves, and more.
    IPixelmonPlayerData
    Provides access to a player's Pixelmon data, including party and PC storage.
    IPlayer<T extends net.minecraft.entity.player.EntityPlayerMP>
    Represents a player in the game with methods for managing dialogs, quests, inventory, sound, and more.
    IPlayerAbilityData
    Interface for managing player abilities.
    IPlayerAttributes
    Represents a collection of a player's custom attributes.
    IPlayerBankData
    Holds bank-related data for a player.
    IPlayerData
    Provides access to all persistent data categories for a player, including companion, dialog, quest, faction, transport, mail, trade, and ability data.
    IPlayerDialogData
    Tracks which dialogs a player has read.
    IPlayerEffect
    Represents an active custom effect instance on a player.
    IPlayerEvent
    Events fired for player actions including combat, items, movement, and interactions.
    IPlayerEvent.AchievementEvent
    Fired when the player earns an achievement.
    IPlayerEvent.AttackedEvent
    Fired when the player is attacked (before armor reduction).
    IPlayerEvent.AttackEvent
    Fired when the player attacks an entity.
    IPlayerEvent.BonemealEvent
    Fired when the player uses bonemeal on a block.
    IPlayerEvent.BreakEvent
    Fired when the player breaks a block.
    IPlayerEvent.ChangedDimension
    Fired when the player changes dimensions.
    IPlayerEvent.ChatEvent
    Fired when the player sends a chat message.
    IPlayerEvent.ContainerClosed
    Fired when the player closes a container.
    IPlayerEvent.ContainerOpen
    Fired when the player opens a container.
    IPlayerEvent.DamagedEntityEvent
    Fired when the player deals damage to an entity (after hit).
    IPlayerEvent.DamagedEvent
    Fired when the player takes damage (after armor reduction).
    IPlayerEvent.DiedEvent
    Fired when the player dies.
    IPlayerEvent.DropEvent
    Fired when items are dropped from the player's inventory (e.g., on death).
    IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent
    Events fired for player custom effects (add, tick, remove).
    IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Added
    Fired when an effect is added to the player.
    IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Removed
    Fired when an effect is removed from the player.
    IPlayerEvent.EffectEvent.Ticked
    Fired each tick while the effect is active.
    IPlayerEvent.FallEvent
    Fired when the player falls.
    IPlayerEvent.FillBucketEvent
    Fired when the player fills a bucket.
    IPlayerEvent.FinishUsingItem
    Fired when the player finishes using an item (full duration).
    IPlayerEvent.InitEvent
    Fired when the player script is initialized.
    IPlayerEvent.InteractEvent
    Fired when the player interacts with an entity.
    IPlayerEvent.JumpEvent
    Fired when the player jumps.
    IPlayerEvent.KeyPressedEvent
    Fired when the player presses or releases a key.
    IPlayerEvent.KilledEntityEvent
    Fired when the player kills an entity.
    IPlayerEvent.LevelUpEvent
    Fired when the player levels up.
    IPlayerEvent.LightningEvent
    Fired when the player is about to be struck by lightning.
    IPlayerEvent.LoginEvent
    Fired when the player logs in.
    IPlayerEvent.LogoutEvent
    Fired when the player logs out.
    IPlayerEvent.MouseClickedEvent
    Fired when the player clicks a mouse button.
    IPlayerEvent.PickUpEvent
    Fired when the player picks up an item.
    IPlayerEvent.PickupXPEvent
    Fired when the player picks up experience orbs.
    IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent
    Events fired for profile operations (create, change, remove).
    IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Changed
    Fired when the player switches profile slots.
    IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Create
    Fired when a new profile is created.
    IPlayerEvent.ProfileEvent.Removed
    Fired when a profile is removed.
    IPlayerEvent.RangedChargeEvent
    Fired when the player begins charging a ranged weapon.
    IPlayerEvent.RangedLaunchedEvent
    Fired when the player launches a ranged weapon (e.g., bow).
    IPlayerEvent.RespawnEvent
    Fired when the player respawns after death.
    IPlayerEvent.RightClickEvent
    Fired when the player right-clicks.
    IPlayerEvent.SleepEvent
    Fired when the player sleeps in a bed.
    IPlayerEvent.SoundEvent
    Fired when a sound is played for the player.
    IPlayerEvent.StartUsingItem
    Fired when the player starts using an item (e.g., drawing a bow).
    IPlayerEvent.StopUsingItem
    Fired when the player stops using an item before completion.
    IPlayerEvent.TimerEvent
    Fired when a player timer triggers.
    IPlayerEvent.TossEvent
    Fired when the player tosses a single item.
    IPlayerEvent.UpdateEvent
    Fired each tick for the player.
    IPlayerEvent.UseHoeEvent
    Fired when the player uses a hoe on a block.
    IPlayerEvent.UsingItem
    Fired each tick while the player is using an item.
    IPlayerEvent.WakeUpEvent
    Fired when the player wakes up from a bed.
    IPlayerFactionData
    Tracks a player's faction standing points.
    IPlayerItemGiverData
    Tracks item giver interaction data for a player, including cooldown timestamps and interaction history.
    IPlayerMail
    Represents a mail message sent to a player, containing pages of text, sender info, optional quest, and item attachments.
    IPlayerMailData
    Manages a player's mail inbox, including sending, removing, and querying mail.
    IPlayerQuestData
    Tracks a player's quest progress, including active, finished, and tracked quests.
    IPlayerTradeData
    Interface for player trade data (currency and auction claims).
    IPlayerTransportData
    Tracks which transport locations a player has unlocked.
    IPos  
    IProfile  
    IProfileHandler
    Manages player profiles, which allow players to have multiple save slots for their CNPC+ data.
    IProfileOptions  
    IProjectile
    Represents a projectile entity.
    IProjectileEvent
    Events fired during NPC projectile lifecycle and impacts.
    IProjectileEvent.ImpactEvent
    Fired when the projectile hits something.
    IProjectileEvent.UpdateEvent
    Fired each tick while the projectile exists.
    IQuest
    Represents a quest with objectives, rewards, repeatability, and party/profile options.
    IQuestCategory
    Represents a category that groups related quests together.
    IQuestDialog
    Quest objective interface for dialog-type quests.
    IQuestEvent
    Events fired during quest lifecycle: starting, completing, and turning in.
    IQuestEvent.QuestCompletedEvent
    Fired when a quest's objectives are all completed.
    IQuestEvent.QuestStartEvent
    Fired when a quest is started/accepted.
    IQuestEvent.QuestTurnedInEvent
    Fired when a completed quest is turned in.
    IQuestHandler
    Handles retrieval of quests and quest categories.
    IQuestInterface
    Marker interface for quest objective types (e.g., kill, item, location, dialog).
    IQuestItem
    Quest objective interface for item-collection quests.
    IQuestKill
    Quest objective interface for kill-type quests.
    IQuestLocation
    Quest objective interface for location-based quests.
    IQuestObjective  
    IRecipe
    Represents a custom crafting recipe for the carpentry table or vanilla workbench.
    IRecipeEvent
    Events fired before and after recipe crafting, for both crafting table and anvil recipes.
    IRecipeEvent.Post
    Fired after a recipe is crafted.
    IRecipeEvent.Pre
    Fired before a recipe is crafted.
    IRecipeHandler
    Handles custom crafting recipes and anvil recipes.
    IRole
    Base interface for all NPC roles (Trader, Follower, Bank, Mailman, Transporter).
    IRoleBank
    Represents the banker role for an NPC, providing storage access to players.
    IRoleFollower  
    IRoleMailman
    Represents the mailman role for an NPC, enabling mail delivery to players.
    IRoleTrader  
    IRoleTransporter
    Represents the transporter role for an NPC, allowing players to teleport between unlocked transport locations.
    IScoreboard  
    IScoreboardObjective  
    IScoreboardTeam  
    IScreenSize
    Represents the scaled screen dimensions of the client display.
    IScriptHookHandler
    Handler for registering and retrieving script hooks.
    IScroll
    Represents a scrollable list component in a custom GUI.
    ISkinOverlay
    A skin overlay object for both NPCs and players.
    ISlot  
    ISound
    Represents a sound that can be played at a position or attached to an entity, with configurable volume, pitch, repeat behavior, and position.
    ITag
    Represents a tag that can be applied to NPCs for categorization and filtering.
    ITagHandler
    Handles creation, deletion, and retrieval of tags.
    ITelegraph
    A telegraph is a visual warning indicator that displays on the ground.
    ITelegraphHandler
    Handler for creating and managing telegraphs.
    ITelegraphInstance
    A runtime instance of an active telegraph in the world.
    ITextField
    Represents a text field component in a custom GUI.
    ITextPlane
    Represents a text plane that can be positioned, rotated, and scaled on a block.
    ITexturedRect
    Represents a textured rectangle component in a custom GUI.
    IThrowable<T extends net.minecraft.entity.projectile.EntityThrowable>
    Represents a throwable entity with additional methods.
    ITileEntity  
    ITimers  
    ITintData
    Provides configuration data for an NPC's color tinting effects.
    ITransportCategory
    Represents a category that groups transport locations together.
    ITransportHandler
    Handles transport categories and their locations.
    ITransportLocation
    Represents a transport destination that players can teleport to.
    IVillager<T extends net.minecraft.entity.passive.EntityVillager>
    Represents a villager entity with additional trading-related methods.
    IWorld
